arts.ttl: Ipswich stun Spurs to claim first win of season
arts.sum: Ipswich Town secured their first Premier League victory of the season when they deservedly beat Tottenham Hotspur 2-1 away thanks to first-half goals by Sammie Szmodics and Liam Delap on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Ipswich stun Spurs away from home to secure first Premier League win since 2002
arts.sum: Rodrigo Bentancur’s goal midway through the second period halved the deficit but the Tractor Boys held on for a memorable triumph.

arts.ttl: Szmodics and Delap stun Spurs as Ipswich end long wait for first win
arts.athr: Nick Ames at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium
arts.sum: Ipswich had waited 22 and a half years for this, and how their vibrant support celebrated after nine seemingly interminable minutes of added time. It said plenty that their first Premier League win since April 2002 was entirely deserved, a clever first-half performance seeing them pull clear through goals from Sammie Szmodics and Liam Delap before they passed a test of resilience in the second. Rodrigo Bentancur’s header was all that Tottenham, disjointed throughout and never quite managing a late siege, could manage and the outcome was yet another feather in the cap for Kieran McKenna. The Ipswich manager began as an academy coach at Spurs and his side’s performance was a credit to him here. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'This is Spurs': Ian Wright lays into Tottenham after seeing their performance v Ipswich today
arts.sum: Tottenham fans saw their team lose against Ipswich Town and Ian Wright has take his opportunity to remind the world just why the north Londoners...

arts.ttl: Ipswich stun Spurs away from home to secure first Premier League win since 2002
arts.sum: Rodrigo Bentancur’s goal midway through the second period halved the deficit but the Tractor Boys held on for a memorable triumph.

arts.ttl: Tottenham 1-2 Ipswich: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Tractor Boys earn first Premier League win
arts.sum: A dogged Ipswich Town finally earn their first Premier League win of the season at the 11th attempt as they stunned Tottenham Hotspur 2-1 in North London.

arts.ttl: Sloppy Spurs booed off as Ipswich record first Premier League win
arts.sum: Ipswich recorded their first Premier League win of the season with a shock 2-1 win over sloppy and lacklustre Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Tottenham 1-2 Ipswich: Sammie Szmodics overhead kick helps Tractor Boys record their first Premier League win in more than 22 years
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW AT TOTTENHAM HOTSPUR STADIUM: This sweet taste of Premier League victory has been a long time coming for Ipswich. More than 22 years they have waited.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Ipswich Town – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: Spurs welcome Ipswich Town to the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in the Premier League for the first time this Sunday. The Lilywhites are still yearning for consistency after being on the wrong side of a 3-2 scoreline away at Turkish giants Galatasaray on Thursday night. arts.ttl: Man United, Chelsea and Tottenham keeping close tabs on 22-year-old Englishman
arts.sum: Archie Brown has been linked with a return to England in recent weeks and Premier League clubs Chelsea, Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur are keen on the player.
